global.desc: Export to dozens of countries. Opening a representative office in Kazakhstan — a step to Central Asian markets.

csr.title: Social responsibility

about.title: About JIMON
about.subtitle: 33 years of consistent growth at the crossroads of tradition and science
about.history_text: JIMON Group brings together four historic brands of traditional Chinese medicine. Over three decades the group has grown into a «1+6+1» structure: one R&D centre, six manufacturing sites and one international development hub.
about.mission_text: Conveying the essence of Eastern medicine while staying loyal to tradition, we create modern health products available to people anywhere in the world.
about.leader_role: Chairman of the Board, JIMON Group
about.leader_quote: “By conveying the essence and innovating in loyalty, we advance the health industry and bring the power of Eastern nature to every home.”
about.leader_bio: Under his leadership JIMON Group has united four century-old brands of traditional Chinese medicine and built the «1+6+1» manufacturing structure, ensuring gold-standard quality at every stage.
